title: Ubiquiti UACC-G4-DBP-Cable-USB-7M - G4 Doorbell Pro PoE cable, 7m
description: Very high-quality connecting USB-C cable long 7m , which is used for power and data between the UniFi Protect G4 Doorbell Pro and the reduction from USB-C to Ethernet UACC- Adapter-PoE-USBC. The cable is terminated on both sides with a straight USB-C connector. The cable has a diameter of 4.8 mm
